channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Severe dip in road where it joins the bridge over M5, 18th March
item.description:
There is a short stretch of road comprising the surface of the bridge over the M5 where it joins the recent resurfaced road, and which has not been resurfaced. At the join there is a pre-existing severe dip presumably where the bridge structure joins the road. I had expected this to be fixed as part of resurfacing but it seems it has not. The impact is akin to having a wide pothole across the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Very large pothole near drain, 18th March
item.description:
Pothole near drain on road by three gables, Southcourt drive. Has been getting increasingly bigger over the last 3 months it has been there and more dangerous to those driving. Been reported before but report says not big enough to require fixing yet… how much bigger does it need to be?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Southcourt Drive, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footway closure after the bridge reconstruction., 18th March
item.description:
Please inform me when the footway on the upstream side of the recently rebuilt bridge over the River Chelt will be open? The photograph shows the closure.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 267a, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th March
item.description:
Permanent repair 2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 1100x800x100mm number 1 (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: Small radiator dumped on London Road, next to kebaburger, 18th March
item.description:
A small radiator has been fly tipped in bushes next to kebaburger takeaway, on London Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, London Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes in middle of road, 18th March
item.description:
Long stretch of road absolutely ruined, so many pot holes its barely undrivable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Pot holesin middle of road, 18th March
item.description:
Pot holes in middle of road on junction turn into a very busy road, lots of holes as road seems to have worn away.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 18th March
item.description:
large pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in middle of road, 18th March
item.description:
Pot hole in middle of road on junction (outside pub entrance), very dangerous as cars always swerving to avoid as very deep and its on a junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Notley Place, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in middle of road, 18th March

item.title: Pot hole in middle of road, 18th March
item.description:
Pot hole in middle of road as soon as you turn into the junction, on the old red bricks on zoons road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchdown Lane, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 700x600x30mm number 2 unable to mark up size is approx footway criteria applied (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
